positive: Minimalist geometric celestial map design, depicting stylized constellations and planetary orbits. The central subject is a stylized, glowing crescent moon surrounded by interconnected, thin-line constellations forming recognizable yet abstract animal or mythical shapes (like an ouroboros or a serpent). Use a deep indigo and cosmic teal color palette contrasted with luminous gold or warm cream lines. The composition must be perfectly centered and contained within a circular or hexagonal boundary for optimal print framing. The style should be elegant, Art Nouveau influence meets modern Scandinavian minimalism, rendered with high contrast, clean silhouettes, and flat color blocking, suitable for a single-color screen print or detailed textile print. Isolated on a pure white background.
negative: text, signature, logo, watermark, copyright, blurry, noisy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, gradient, gradients, low detail, messy, busy background, photorealism, 3d render, clutter
